title: MC Light
description: Optimization-focused modpack that enhances FPS, chunk loading, and stability without changing vanilla.
body:
Boost your Minecraft performance with this lightweight optimization modpack, built around Sodium. Enjoy smoother gameplay, higher FPS, and a more stable experience without sacrificing the vanilla Minecraft feel.

Description:
This modpack is designed for players who want maximum performance and minimal lag. At its core is Sodium, a powerful rendering engine replacement that dramatically improves frame rates and reduces stutter.

In addition to Sodium, this pack includes carefully selected optimization mods that:

Reduce unnecessary client-side processing.

Improve chunk loading and memory usage.

Enhance visual performance while keeping Minecraft looking clean and sharp.

Provide quality-of-life tweaks that make gameplay smoother.

Whether you have a lower-end PC or just want the smoothest Minecraft experience possible, this modpack makes your game run faster, look better, and feel more responsive—without changing the core Minecraft experience.

Key Features:

Sodium: Major FPS boost and smoother visuals.

Performance Tweaks: Optimizations for memory, rendering, and chunk loading.

Compatibility Focused: Works with most lightweight mods.

Vanilla-Friendly: Keeps the original Minecraft feel intact.

Transform Minecraft into a fast, stable, and responsive game—perfect for survival, building, or large servers.
![fps](https://i.imgur.com/1DG7wUD.png)
